title: verbascum ramosum
intro: Verbascum ramosum, also known as the branched mullein, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain mucilage and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum ramosum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wound healing due to its antimicrobial properties. Verbascum ramosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
